new_classes.label_en: Other Spirituous Beverage not elsewhere specified in containers > 2 L (CN 2208 90 78)
new_classes.label_de: Andere alkoholhaltige Getränke, anderweitig nicht genannt, in Behältnissen mit mehr als 2 Litern (KN 2208 90 78)
new_classes.definition_en: Spirituous beverage falling under CN 2208 90 78: other spirituous beverages not elsewhere specified (NES), presented in containers of more than 2 litres. See the explanatory note to subheading 2208 90 69 for the scope of 'other spirituous beverages NES'.

coverage_explanation: The legal text for CN 2208 90 78 is very brief — it merely labels this node as "Other spirituous beverages" and cross-references the explanatory note to subheading 2208 90 69 for the full substantive criteria. The primary distinguishing criterion that can be modelled from the CN hierarchy itself is that these are 'other spirituous beverages NES' presented in containers greater than 2 litres (contrasted with the sibling subheading 2208 90 77, which also covers NES spirituous beverages in containers > 2 L, and 2208 90 69 in containers ≤ 2 L — the exact container-size boundary between 77 and 78 requires the cross-referenced note for 2208 90 69 which is not reproduced here). The new class is correctly placed under eucn:OtherSpiritousBeverageNES (which already exists in the running TBox as a sibling-level parent for 2208 90 77 large container). The container-size restriction (has part some LargeContainer) is modelled using the existing eucn:LargeContainer class. Coverage is partial (0.7) because: (1) the full product-scope criteria from the cross-referenced note to 2208 90 69 are not captured in the axioms (they would require reviewing that note's text); (2) whether 2208 90 78 is specifically for containers > 2 L or some other criterion cannot be confirmed from the provided legal text alone.
